tempo_integration.ceilings: Logical defaults (PRIMARY: E=6/IB=3/IT=2; ASSISTANCE: E=5; ACCESSORY: E=4)
tempo_integration.explosive_concentric_allowed: True for PRIMARY/ASSISTANCE, False for ACCESSORY
tempo_integration.tempo_can_escalate_hnode: False (default; requires expert review for True cases)

exercises.notes: Primary squat pattern; Band3 allowed GREEN; prohibit Node3 pairing.

Tempo makes it H0; not for Day D (intent lock).
Anterior-loaded squat variation; high trunk demand.
Advanced unilateral squat; high balance demand.
Angled loading; good for teaching squat pattern.
Pause at bottom on box; teaches RFD.
Knee-dominant squat variant; high quad stretch.
Primary hinge; avoid Node3 at Band2+ if already dense week.
Higher systemic cost; Node1 only; not on B/C except advanced override.
Allowed Node3; counts full quad volume.
Glute dominant; treat as hinge assistance.
Neutral grip deadlift; more quad involvement.
Posterior chain assistance; moderate spinal load.
Increased range of motion deadlift; advanced.
Unilateral compound; avoid Band3 in most populations.
Higher density ok; classify as Assistance not Day D.
Bodyweight horizontal push; loaded via belt.
Primary vertical push; monitor shoulder history.
Power overhead press; leg drive allowed.
Seated floor overhead press; high core demand.
If weighted, Band2; high density ok.
Strict barbell row from floor each rep.
Supported row variant; high load capacity.
Higher angle row targeting rear delts.

Wide grip lat pulldown; lat width emphasis.
Advanced vertical pull to press transition.
Long head emphasis with rope attachment.

Core stability; not PRIME per scope lock.
Counts as H3 due to rotation + load + coordination.

Day D only; prohibits hypertrophy tempo prescriptions.
Accessory/postural; still counts volume for rear delts/upper back.
